<page_header><loc_390><loc_6><loc_457><loc_13>Document 863-1</page_header>
<section_header_level_1><loc_44><loc_35><loc_456><loc_63>Shielded Power Inductors - XAL7030</section_header_level_1>
<picture><loc_44><loc_90><loc_243><loc_227><other></picture>
<otsl><loc_43><loc_238><loc_342><loc_332><fcel>Part number 1<fcel>Inductance 2 ±20% (µH)<fcel>DCR (mOhms) 3<fcel>SRF typ 4 (MHz)<nl><fcel>XAL7030-161ME_<fcel>0.16<fcel>1.15<fcel>26.58<nl><fcel>XAL7030-301ME_<fcel>0.30<fcel>1.75<fcel>92<nl><fcel>XAL7030-601ME_<fcel>0.60<fcel>3.00<fcel>3.30<nl><fcel>XAL7030-102ME_<fcel>1.0<fcel>4.55<fcel>5.00<nl><fcel>XAL7030-152ME_<fcel>1.5<fcel>7.60<fcel>8.36<nl><fcel>XAL7030-222ME_<fcel>2.2<fcel>13.7<fcel>15.07<nl><fcel>XAL7030-272ME_<fcel>2.7<fcel>15.7<fcel>17.30<nl><fcel>XAL7030-332ME_<fcel>3.3<fcel>19.5<fcel>21.45<nl><fcel>XAL7030-472ME_<fcel>4.7<fcel>26.1<fcel>30.00<nl><fcel>XAL7030-562ME_<fcel>5.6<fcel>28.1<fcel>32.32<nl><fcel>XAL7030-682ME_<fcel>6.8<fcel>45.0<fcel>51.75<nl><fcel>XAL7030-822ME_<fcel>8.2<fcel>53.0<fcel>60.94<nl><fcel>XAL7030-103ME_<fcel>10.60<fcel>4.69<fcel>12<nl></otsl>
<unordered_list><list_item><loc_44><loc_338><loc_229><loc_343>1. When ordering, please specify termination and packaging code:</list_item>
</unordered_list>
<section_header_level_1><loc_106><loc_347><loc_158><loc_353>XAL7030-103MEC</section_header_level_1>
<text><loc_52><loc_355><loc_242><loc_372>Termination: E = Halogen free component. RoHS compliant tin-silver over copper terminations. Special order: T = RoHS tin-silver-copper (95.5/4/0.5) or S = non-RoHS tin-lead (63/37).</text>
<text><loc_52><loc_376><loc_83><loc_381>Packaging:</text>
<text><loc_103><loc_376><loc_238><loc_399>C = 7" machine-ready reel. EIA-481 embossed plastic tape (40 parts per full reel). Quantities less than full reel available: in tape (not machine ready) or with leader and trailer ($25 charge).</text>
<unordered_list><list_item><loc_91><loc_400><loc_242><loc_421>B = Less than full reel. In an effort to simplify our part numbering system, Coilcraft is eliminating the need for multiple packaging codes. When ordering, simply change the last letter of your part number from B to C.</list_item>
<list_item><loc_91><loc_422><loc_242><loc_437>D = 13" machine-ready reel. EIA-481 embossed plastic tape. Factory order only, not stocked (1500 parts per full reel).</list_item>
</unordered_list>
<picture><loc_44><loc_460><loc_137><loc_486><logo></picture>
<page_footer><loc_166><loc_460><loc_319><loc_492>US +1-847-639-6400 sales@coilcraft.com UK +44-1236-730595 sales@coilcraft-europe.com Taiwan +886-2-2264 3646 sales@coilcraft.com.tw China +86-21-6218 8074 sales@coilcraft.com.cn Singapore + 65-6484 8412 sales@coilcraft.com.sg</page_footer>
<unordered_list><list_item><loc_257><loc_91><loc_362><loc_97>· High current and very low DCR</list_item>
<list_item><loc_257><loc_98><loc_327><loc_104>· AEC-Q200 qualified</list_item>
<list_item><loc_257><loc_105><loc_451><loc_111>· Soft saturation makes them ideal for VRM/VRD applications.</list_item>
</unordered_list>
<text><loc_257><loc_117><loc_399><loc_128>Designer's Kit C441 contains 3 each of all values Core material</text>
<text><loc_257><loc_129><loc_390><loc_135>Environmental RoHS compliant, halogen free</text>
<text><loc_257><loc_135><loc_452><loc_151>Terminations RoHS compliant tin-silver (96.5/3.5) over copper. Other terminations available at additional cost.</text>
<text><loc_257><loc_152><loc_316><loc_157>Operating voltage:</text>
<text><loc_257><loc_158><loc_455><loc_170>Ambient temperature -40°C to +125°C with (40°C rise) Irms current. Maximum part temperature +165°C (ambient + temp rise). Derating.</text>
<text><loc_257><loc_171><loc_452><loc_177>Storage temperature Component: -55°C to +165°C.</text>
<text><loc_257><loc_177><loc_452><loc_183>Tape and reel packaging: -55°C to +80°C to +260°C, parts cooled to room temperature between cycles</text>
<text><loc_257><loc_184><loc_452><loc_202>Resistance to soldering heat Max three 40 second reflows at +260°C, parts cooled to room temperature between cycles Moisture Sensitivity Level (MSL) 1 (unlimited floor life at <30°C /</text>
<text><loc_257><loc_202><loc_452><loc_207>85% relative humidity).</text>
<text><loc_257><loc_208><loc_437><loc_214>Packaging 400/7" reel; 1500/13" reel Plastic tape: 16 mm wide,</text>
<text><loc_257><loc_215><loc_447><loc_220>0.3 mm thick, 12 mm pocket spacing, 3.3 mm pocket depth</text>
<text><loc_257><loc_221><loc_447><loc_232>PCB washing Tested to MIL-STD-202 Method 215 plus an additional aqueous wash. See Doc787_PCB_Washington.pdf.</text>
<text><loc_257><loc_240><loc_268><loc_245>Isat 5</text>
<text><loc_257><loc_245><loc_268><loc_250>(A)</text>
<text><loc_287><loc_240><loc_308><loc_245>Irms (A) 6</text>
<text><loc_287><loc_245><loc_308><loc_250>20°C rise</text>
<text><loc_320><loc_245><loc_329><loc_250>40°C rise</text>
<text><loc_357><loc_250><loc_450><loc_268>Irms Testing was performed on 0.75 inch wide × 0.25 inch thick copper traces in still air.</text>
<text><loc_357><loc_270><loc_450><loc_290>Temperature rise is highly dependent on many factors including pcb land pattern, trace size, and proximity to other components. Therefore</text>
<text><loc_357><loc_291><loc_450><loc_298>temperature rise should be verified in application conditions.</text>
<section_header_level_1><loc_357><loc_338><loc_384><loc_343>2. Inductance tested at 1 MHz, 0.1 Vrms, 0 Adc.</section_header_level_1>
<unordered_list><list_item><loc_257><loc_345><loc_367><loc_350>3. DCR measured on a micro-ohmmeter.</list_item>
<list_item><loc_257><loc_351><loc_409><loc_356>4. SRF measured using Agilent/HP 4395A or equivalent.</list_item>
<list_item><loc_257><loc_357><loc_451><loc_368>5. DC current at 25°C that causes an induction drop of 30% (typ
